title: Supporting information
description: Information to help you complete your paper tax return or tax return supplement.

child_links.title: Amounts that you do not pay tax on 2013
child_links.description: Information about those amounts that you do not pay tax on.

child_links.title: Special circumstances and glossary 2013
child_links.description: Special circumstances affecting how your tax is calculated and a glossary of terms used in the tax return instructions.

child_links.title: Referred publications 2012-13
child_links.description: You may need to refer to some of these publications and rulings to prepare your 2012–13 tax return.

child_links.title: Checklist - tax return 2013
child_links.description: Complete the tax return checklist to avoid any delays when you lodge your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Checklist - supplement 2013
child_links.description: Complete the supplementary checklist to make sure you have completed your supplementary tax return before lodgment.

child_links.title: Separation of new News Corporation from Twenty-First Century Fox, Inc.
child_links.description: How to find out about the separation of News Corporation from Twenty-First Century Fox, Inc.

child_links.title: Woolworths Limited - creating a new stapled security 2012
child_links.description: How to find out about updated tax consequences of participation in the 2012 Woolworths restructure.

child_links.title: Key events for Australian shareholders 2012-13
child_links.description: Contains links to documents about large company transactions which may impact a large number of Individual taxpayers.

child_links.title: Tax time checklist
child_links.description: Lodging your tax return is easier when you have all the information you will need to lodge.
